style_target_summary: painterly first, not hyperreal or PBR-like
selective detail rather than uniform micro-detail
low particulate density and restrained surface noise
varied composition, orientation, perspective, and camera placement
avoid excessive geometric clutter and generic anime drift

approved_images.lighting: golden-hour sunlight breaking through large cloud masses
approved_images.composition_camera: wide elevated establishing view with monumental skyline and foreground overlook
approved_images.palette: warm cream-gold architecture, blue banners, cool blue-gray sky
approved_images.detail_density: moderate-to-high, selectively concentrated around architecture and plaza

approved_images.lighting: warm sunset with practical lantern glow and reflected light
approved_images.weather: clear with large stylized cloud forms
approved_images.composition_camera: experimental close street-level framing opening toward a varied skyline; strong foreground enclosure and depth
approved_images.palette: warm orange-gold, deep navy shadows, muted stone, selective blue accents
approved_images.detail_density: target balance: painterly, selectively detailed, neither sparse nor overtextured

approved_images.subcategory: highland valley with monumental stone bridge
approved_images.lighting: golden-hour backlighting with warm sunset glow and cool valley shadows
approved_images.weather: clear to lightly clouded with atmospheric haze
approved_images.composition_camera: wide experimental overlook; foreground traveler at left, bridge sweeping across center, distant fortress at right
approved_images.palette: warm gold and peach sky, cool blue-gray mountains, deep green vegetation, muted stone
approved_images.detail_density: moderate selective detail with broad painterly masses and restrained texture
strengths: clear focal flow across the frame
good balance of environment scale and human presence
